# Open Domain Data

> Open, versioned datasets describing the domain infrastructure ecosystem.
> Open Domain Data publishes structured datasets only. It does not rank
> registrars, recommend providers, or sell domains.

## What this project is
Open Domain Data is an open-source project that publishes machine-readable
datasets about domain registrars, registrar APIs, DNS capabilities, TLD
pricing, RDAP metadata and security contacts. Every record carries a
verification status, a source list and a timestamp.

## What this project is NOT
- Not a registrar.
- Not a domain marketplace.
- Not a ranking site. Open Domain Data does not score, rank or recommend
  registrars. Ranking products are maintained separately and must
  disclose how they use this data.

## Datasets

- registrars: /api/registrars.json
- registrar_api_capabilities: /api/registrar_api_capabilities.json
- dns_capabilities: /api/dns_capabilities.json
- tld_pricing: /api/tld_pricing.json
- rdap_metadata: /api/rdap_metadata.json
- registrar_security_contacts: /api/registrar_security_contacts.json
- agent_capability_signals: /api/agent_capability_signals.json

## Schemas

- /schemas/registrar.schema.json
- /schemas/api-capabilities.schema.json
- /schemas/dns-capabilities.schema.json
- /schemas/pricing.schema.json

## Docs
- Methodology: /methodology
- Verification statuses: /methodology#verification
- Changelog: /changelog
- Developer reference: /developers
- Contribute: /contribute

## License
All datasets are published under CC BY 4.0. Cite as:
Open Domain Data (2026). <dataset_name>, v<release>. opendomaindata.org.
